intent: Write a sentiment-aware product comparison on 'budget smartphone accessories' (cases, chargers, cables, stands). You MUST research BOTH sources: (1) the One Stop Market shopping site — browse the cell-phones-accessories category and collect at least 5 products spanning at least three sub-types (e.g. case, charger, cable, mount/stand, power bank). Record price, rating, and review count from each detail page. (2) Reddit — browse /f/technology AND /f/LifeProTips for posts discussing which cheap phone accessories are worth buying, safety of off-brand chargers, or longevity of budget cables. Collect at least 3 posts with title, score, and comment count. The report must: (a) rank the storefront products by price-to-rating ratio, (b) surface at least two specific Reddit warnings about risks of budget accessories (electrical safety, short lifespan, counterfeit), (c) mark each of your storefront picks as 'community-supported', 'community-neutral', or 'community-concerned', (d) end with a recommendation for a $40 accessory bundle. Cite every price, rating, and community claim with a markdown link.
author_notes: Shopping (cell-phones-accessories) + Reddit (technology + LifeProTips). Tests price-vs-rating ranking plus community-risk tagging.
